name: Infernity Conjurer
name_jp: インフェルニティ・コンジュラー
desc: While you have no cards in your hand, monsters your opponent controls lose 800 ATK. While you have no cards in your hand and this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Infernity Conjurer" once per turn.
mnst_eff: While you have no cards in your hand, monsters your opponent controls lose 800 ATK. While you have no cards in your hand and this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Infernity Conjurer" once per turn.
eff: While you have no cards in your hand, monsters your opponent controls lose 800 ATK. While you have no cards in your hand and this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Infernity Conjurer" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
misc: Requires having no cards in hand
